---
package: "openpipeline"
version: "v4.2.0"
title: "bcftools"
namespace: "Genetic demux"
description: "Filter the variants called by freebayes or cellSNP"
type: "module"
toc: false
latest: "true"
subtitle: "openpipeline v4.2.0"
---

::: {.column-margin}

### Info

ID: `bcftools`  
Namespace: `genetic_demux`

### Links

[{{< fa brands github >}} View source code](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline/tree/v4.2.0/src/genetic_demux/bcftools)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Browse all versions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Get run instructions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/genetic_demux/bcftools)

:::




## Argument group

### Arguments

|Name            |Description                                                               |Attributes                                                                             |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--vcf`         |VCF files, must have the same sample columns appearing in the same order. |List of `file`, required, example: `"input_1.vcf", "input_2.vcf"`, multiple_sep: `";"` |
|`--concat`      |Concatenate or combine VCFs and sort them.                                |`boolean_true`                                                                         |
|`--filter`      |Filter VCFs.                                                              |`boolean_true`                                                                         |
|`--filter_qual` |Filter VCFs with specified QUAL threshold.                                |`integer`, default: `30`                                                               |
|`--output`      |bcftools output directory                                                 |`file`, example: `"bcftools_out"`                                                      |

## Authors


  * Xichen Wu [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/wxicu) [{{< fa brands orcid >}}](https://orcid.org/0009-0008-2168-4508) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/xichen-wu) (author)

## Example commands

You can run the pipeline using `nextflow run`.

### View help

You can use `--help` as a parameter to get an overview of the possible parameters.

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -main-script target/nextflow/genetic_demux/bcftools/main.nf \
  --help
```

### Run command

<details>
<summary>Example of `params.yaml`</summary>

Generate a `params.yaml` for this component on [Viash Hub](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/genetic_demux/bcftools).

</details>

Run locally with:

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -profile docker \
  -main-script target/nextflow/genetic_demux/bcftools/main.nf \
  -params-file params.yaml
```

:::{.callout-note}
Replace `-profile docker` with `-profile podman` or `-profile singularity` depending on the desired backend.
:::

Running on Seqera or through Viash Hub is explained in the [guides](/guides/index.qmd).
